temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man with long, dark hair and a determined, grim expression stands in the center of a large, dark crowd. He is wearing a dark, studded leather jacket. The scene is dimly lit, with a greenish hue, and the crowd behind him is indistinct. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a central, authoritative figure leading a large group of people, setting a tense and mysterious tone.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous hum and the faint sound of shuffling feet.)
(00:02-00:04) A young man with short brown hair, wearing a patterned sweater over a collared shirt, stands in a dark, stone-walled corridor. He looks up with a shocked and fearful expression, his mouth slightly agape as if he has just witnessed something terrible. (Storyline: This cut introduces a new character who is clearly distressed by what he is seeing, creating a sense of mystery about the event that has just occurred.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A faint, tense musical score begins to build.)
(00:05-00:07) A wide shot reveals a massive, seemingly endless crowd of people standing in a dark, misty forest clearing. The scene is almost completely black, with only the faint outlines of the crowd and the surrounding trees visible through a thick fog. (Storyline: This shot reveals the immense scale of the gathering, emphasizing the sheer number of people involved in this mysterious event.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A sudden, loud shout is heard, followed by a rising, dramatic musical score.)
